title: Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families 23 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community At Risk Families Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Domestic Violence Issues Ex-Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community TANF Recipients 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers classroom and in-home support. Services include help with setting goals, supporting social and emotional development, and creating a safe and nurturing home environment. Children receive developmental screenings. Also provides access to child and family counseling, addiction support, parenting education, a food pantry, a clothing closet, and family social events. Limited transportation available. 1720 W 25th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children ages 2-6 who are low income and experiencing multiple stressors. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm. (541) 343-9706 111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support through home visits, resource navigation, and respite child care for families in immediate need of help. Families involved in outreach also have access to other Relief Nursery services. 1720 W 25th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Low-income families with children age 6 and younger who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm (541) 343-9706 111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY ROBIN JAQUA CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers classroom and in-home support. Services include help with setting goals, supporting social and emotional development, and creating a safe and nurturing home environment. Children receive developmental screenings. Also provides access to child and family counseling, addiction support, parenting education, a food pantry, a clothing closet, and family social events. Limited transportation available. 850 S 42nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Low-income families with children ages 2-6 who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm. Families involved in outreach also have access to other Relief Nursery services. 850 S 42nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Low-income families with children age 6 and younger who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm (541) 343-9706 111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY DEVELOPMENT CENTER DOUGLAS COUNTY RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive family support programs, in-home support and counseling, crisis intervention, parent education classes and support groups, community resource and referrals, and play therapy for children. Offers classes for young children with trained teachers. 300 Jerry's Drive Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 673-4354 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY NURTURING CENTER FAMILY NURTURING CENTER JACKSON COUNTY RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive family support for families with children who are experiencing high levels of stress. Services include therapeutic classrooms with low adult-child ratios, family support and individualized case management, home visiting, parenting education, and group activities designed to strengthen parenting skills and promote healthy child development 825 E Main Street Suite A Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Young children ages 0-5 who are experiencing high levels of stress or who have experienced trauma and/or are at risk for abuse and neglect; parents who have multiple risk factors and are struggling to nurture and care for their children. High-risk families typically experience several of the following factors: poverty, high stress, depression, history of mental illness, lack of reliable transportation, single parenthood, criminal history, adult survivors of child abuse, history with drugs and alcohol, unemployment, low self-esteem, limited education, anger issues, homelessness, or social isolation. Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 779-5242 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY LANE COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides families with a comprehensive set of early childhood and parenting programs, including case management, home visitation, respite care, early intervention, and early childhood special education. Also provides early childhood therapeutic classrooms. Programs for participating parents include a clothing closet, parent education groups, support groups, parent training, a parent resource library, and referrals to child passenger seat programs. 720 N 14th Street Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Families with children ages 6 weeks-6 years -Therapeutic classrooms: Ages 6 weeks-4 years -Respite care and other services: Ages 6 weeks-6 years Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 942-4835 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY FAMILY RELIEF NURSERY NORTH DOUGLAS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides families with a comprehensive set of early childhood and parenting programs, including case management, home visitation, respite care, early intervention, and early childhood special education. Children participate in therapeutic classrooms with low adult-child ratios and families receive home visits that promote healthy parenting and child development. RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides family support, referrals, advocacy, respite care, and parenting classes to parents who are experiencing high levels of stress. Therapeutic classrooms for toddlers and preschoolers and home visits provided as well. 1312 SW 2nd Street Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Parents experiencing stress with children ages 0-6 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 215-1017 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TREASURE VALLEY CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY RELIEF NURSERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Serves families with children who are at risk of abuse and neglect by providing intensive support through individualized case management. Also provides parenting education, home visits, developmental assessments, group activities, and referrals to other community resources. Mental health care, counseling for domestic violence, and support for adults recovering from addiction are offered as well. 780 SE 6th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: -High-risk families with children ages 0-5. Families with children younger than 18 months are served through home visits only -High-risk typically means families experiencing several of the following factors: poverty, high stress, depression, history of mental illness, lack of reliable transportation, single-parent household, criminal history, adult survivor of child abuse, drug and alcohol history, unemployment, low self-esteem, limited education, anger issues, homelessness, or social isolation Hours: Phone hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Classroom sessions: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday. No classes most major holidays including Christmas break. Intakes are completed to determine eligibility.
